data.title: XRP trades at $1.36, eyes $1.53 resistance with support at $1.28. Bullish target for April recovery. Technical indicators indicate potential move to resistance.
data.description: XRP is currently trading at $1.36 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 45.10. Technical analysis indicates a possible increase towards the $1.53 Bollinger Band resistance. It is crucial for bullish trends to maintain support at $1.28.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric Acquires Irish Elevator Company Infinity Lifts
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) revealed plans for a full acquisition of Infinity Lifts Limited, an elevator firm in Ennis, Ireland. The takeover, set to occur on March 18, is projected to finalize by the first half of 2026 pending regulatory clearance and meeting standard closing requirements. Mitsubishi Electric, alongside its Tokyo subsidiary Mitsubishi Electric Building So, is at the forefront of this strategic move.

data.title: UniFirst Gears Up For Q2 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: UniFirst Corporation (NYSE: UNF) is set to reveal its second-quarter earnings on April 1, before the market opens. Analysts project earnings to be $1.21 per share, a decrease from $1.40 per share in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for UniFirst's quarterly revenue stands at $614.91 million, up from $602.22 million in the previous year. In a recent announcement on March 11, UniFirst disclosed its acquisition by Cintas (NASDAQ: CTAS). The company's shares closed at $251.59 on Tuesday, up by 0.9%. For more details and the latest analyst ratings, readers can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga Pro, where information can be sorted by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, or other criteria.
